prompt: Create a 32x32 pixel art tile for a medieval fantasy strategy game. Style: detailed retro pixel art, SNES/GBA era quality. Rich but controlled palette (~64 colors). Subtle shading with 2-3 shade levels per color. Consistent top-left lighting. Tiles should seamlessly connect to adjacent tiles of the same type. Slight dithering for texture on terrain. |vegetation_none.png|||NO VEGETATION. Bare terrain, exposed rock or soil. Neutral background. Top-down view.
